summary.zh-CN: 本版本改进 Agent 设置、会话连续性、取消状态、文件预览和更新前说明。
summary.en-US: This release improves Agent settings, session continuity, cancellation state, file previews, and update notes.

body.zh-CN: Agent 管理页把查看详情和编辑配置分开，只读详情可以展示常用配置事实。
body.en-US: Agent management separates details from editing, with common configuration facts shown in a read-only view.

title.zh-CN: 收起侧栏后也能切换会话
title.en-US: Session switching in the collapsed sidebar

body.zh-CN: 聊天顶部可以搜索并切换最近会话，不需要先展开左侧栏。
body.en-US: The chat header can search and switch between recent sessions without reopening the left sidebar.

body.zh-CN: 更新界面可以展示结构化版本说明，让用户在下载或应用前先看到变化。
body.en-US: The update screen can show structured release notes before users download or apply a new version.

body.zh-CN: 本地 HTML 链接默认保留源码预览，只在明确请求渲染视图时打开页面渲染。
body.en-US: Local HTML links stay in source preview by default and render only when explicitly requested.

title.zh-CN: 取消状态不再误报错误
title.en-US: Cancelled runs no longer look like errors

body.zh-CN: 用户主动取消的运行会显示为已取消，不再作为失败错误出现在会话里。
body.en-US: User-cancelled runs are shown as cancelled instead of failed conversation errors.

body.zh-CN: 上下文压缩会保留当前用户输入，并把压缩后的上下文放入前置系统提示。
body.en-US: Context compaction preserves the current user turn and places compressed context in the leading system prompt.

title.zh-CN: 压缩后不重复插入引导

body.zh-CN: 新会话引导内容不会在压缩后的会话里重复插入。
body.en-US: Fresh-session onboarding content is no longer reinserted after context compaction.

body.zh-CN: NARP stdio prompt timeout 会按空闲超时处理，正在流式输出的任务不再仅因总耗时超限而失败。
body.en-US: NARP stdio prompt timeouts are treated as idle timeouts, so actively streaming runs are not failed only because total request time was exceeded.

body.zh-CN: 本版本不需要手动迁移。
这是 NPM stable patch 版本，可通过正常的 NextClaw NPM 安装或更新流程使用。
body.en-US: This is an NPM stable patch release available through the normal NextClaw NPM install or update flow.
